prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2022年最低位次约3444名，2023年跃升至约2537名（前移约900名），2024年回落至约3555名，2025年进一步后移至约3633名；近3年整体呈后移趋势，2025年基准位次约3633名；该校在宁夏理科/物理类招生计划2022—2025年均为12人，2026年计划仍为12人，连续5年持平，无扩缩招变化，对竞争格局影响中性。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校，软科中国大学排名2026年约第60名，为国内独立医科大学中唯一的211院校，层次稳定；抖音综合热度排名第78位，评价为"一般"，短视频曝光量中等；声誉舆情文件中未收录该校相关事件，未见明显负面或投档异常信号，报考心理预期平稳；该校以临床医学、口腔医学、药学等为传统优势方向，在医学领域具有较高认可度。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 临床医学连续多年为"高热推荐"（2023年，2024年70.19），口腔医学为"推荐"（2024年72.31），医学类专业整体报考热度持续偏热；宁夏2025年物理类考生约44491人，2026年总考生66000人（含历史类），估算物理类约43200人，较2025年略有减少，竞争压力小幅缓解。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次整体后移趋势、招生计划连续持平、2026年宁夏物理类考生数略减及医学类专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年该校最低录取位次较2025年基准3633名小幅前移，预测最低位次约3583名，区间3083—4083名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间（3083—4083名）内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向、一档王牌专业（临床5+3、口腔5+3）作为冲刺、三档专业作为保底；位次明显优于区间下限（3083名以内）可重点冲击一档本硕一体化培养专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2022, the minimum ranking was approximately 3444, rising to about 2537 in 2023 (moving forward by about 900 places), falling back to about 3555 in 2024, and further moving back to about 3633 in 2025; the overall trend over the past 3 years has been a backward shift, with the baseline ranking for 2025 at about 3633; the enrollment plan for this university in Ningxia's science/physics category was 12 students from 2022 to 2025, and the plan for 2026 remains 12 students, unchanged for 5 consecutive years, with no expansion or reduction, having a neutral impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university, ranked approximately 60th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, the only 211 institution among independent medical universities in China, with a stable level; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking 78th, rated as "average", with moderate short video exposure; the reputation and risk document does not include any related incidents for this university, with no obvious negative signals or abnormal application trends, resulting in stable psychological expectations for applicants; the university has traditional strengths in clinical medicine, stomatology, pharmacy, etc., and enjoys high recognition in the medical field.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical medicine has been a "highly recommended" major for consecutive years (2023, 2024 at 70.19), stomatology is "recommended" (2024 at 72.31), and medical majors overall continue to be hot; in 2025, Ningxia had about 44,491 physics category examinees, and in 2026, the total examinees are 66,000 (including history category), with an estimated physics category of about 43,200, a slight decrease from 2025, leading to a slight easing of competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the overall backward trend in historical rankings, the unchanged enrollment plan, the slight decrease in Ningxia's physics category examinees in 2026, and the sustained high popularity of medical majors, it is predicted that the minimum admission ranking for this university in 2026 will move slightly forward from the 2025 baseline of 3633, with a predicted minimum ranking of about 3583, and a range of 3083 to 4083.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range (3083–4083), it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main direction, use Tier 1 flagship majors (Clinical 5+3, Stomatology 5+3) as a sprint, and Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 3083), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 integrated bachelor's-master's programs.
